title: ScheduleConfig
description:
Schedule configuration containing info about the clock in/clock out
grace period.

guid.description: The GUID maintained by the Toast platform.

minBeforeClockIn.description: Grace period minutes before clock in

minAfterClockIn.description: Grace period minutes after clock in

minBeforeClockOut.description: Grace period minutes before clock out

minAfterClockOut.description: Grace period minutes after clock out
